steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Line $l$ is parallel to $y = 8x + 4$, so it has slope $8$. It passes through the origin, giving equation $y = 8x$.

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: 48 is correct. The problem asks for the coordinate value $d$, so the final response should be the number itself rather than the full equation of the line.
